overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through Night City's neon-lit urban plaza. The player character moves past digital advertisement pillars and crowds of NPCs, transitioning from an open plaza through a food stall area and finally entering the narrow, pink-lit Jig-Jig Street.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the neon-lit plaza past large cylindrical digital pillars

entered.detail: tall cylindrical digital advertisement pillar displaying cyan and pink graphics
tall cylindrical digital advertisement pillar with glowing base
overhead cyan neon light strips running along the plaza ceiling
tall modern building with illuminated windows in the background
wet reflective tiled pavement with neon reflections

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a futuristic urban plaza at night, dominated by large digital advertisement pillars and overhead cyan neon strips. The camera moves forward through scattered crowds of pedestrians standing in groups, with wet reflective pavement catching the neon glow.

segments.scene_description: Moving into a more open plaza area, the scene features cherry blossom trees with pink lighting and illuminated benches. The camera approaches a group of NPCs on a bench where one woman is taking photos of two others, before continuing past them.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor food stall with traditional Japanese architectural elements

tables and chairs arranged in front of the food stall

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a food stall area featuring traditional Japanese architectural elements with red paper lanterns. The camera moves past outdoor seating where NPCs are eating, and a vendor is visible working behind the counter.

segments.scene_description: The camera crosses an asphalt street toward the entrance of Jig-Jig Street, marked by a large overhead archway. The Bliss club sign is visible on the left, and concrete barriers line the street entrance as the scene transitions from open plaza to narrow alley.

agents.ego_description: walking down the narrow Jig-Jig Street surrounded by pedestrians and vibrant neon signs

building covered with pink and purple neon lights and advertisements

tall vertical pink neon sign on building side

segments.scene_description: The final segment enters the narrow Jig-Jig Street, a confined alleyway dominated by a large overhead pink neon sign. The walls are covered with dense neon signage in pink and purple hues, and the camera moves through moderate crowds of pedestrians walking in the same direction.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a neon-lit urban plaza that gradually narrows into a dense, pink-hued alleyway. It begins by moving through a futuristic plaza dominated by cyan neon strips and digital advertisement pillars, gliding over wet reflective pavement and past scattered crowds. As the space opens up, the camera passes pink-lit cherry blossom trees and pedestrians on illuminated benches before shifting toward a food stall area characterized by red paper lanterns and traditional Japanese architecture. The scene then crosses an asphalt street and passes the Bliss club sign, moving under a large overhead archway that marks the transition from the open plaza to a confined street. Finally, the camera enters the narrow corridor of Jig-Jig Street, where the environment becomes a dense canyon of pink and purple neon signage and flowing crowds of pedestrians.
